title: Collagen Loss After 40: What's Happening and How to Slow It
seo_title: Collagen Loss After 40: What's Happening | Happy Aging
meta_description: Women lose up to 30% of skin collagen in the first five years after menopause. Learn why collagen declines and the best ways to slow and replenish it.
